verses.latin_vulgate: In die illa visitabit Dominus  in gladio suo duro, et grandi, et forti,  super Leviathan, serpentem vectem,  et super Leviathan, serpentem tortuosum,  et occidet cetum qui in mari est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֡וּא יִפְקֹ֣ד יְהֹוָה֩ בְּחַרְבּ֨וֹ הַקָּשָׁ֜ה וְהַגְּדוֹלָ֣ה וְהַחֲזָקָ֗ה עַ֤ל לִוְיָתָן֙ נָחָ֣שׁ בָּרִ֔חַ וְעַל֙ לִוְיָתָ֔ן נָחָ֖שׁ עֲקַלָּת֑וֹן וְהָרַ֥ג אֶת־הַתַּנִּ֖ין אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּיָּֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: In that day the Lord with his sore and great and strong sword shall punish leviathan the piercing serpent, even leviathan that crooked serpent; and he shall slay the dragon that is in the sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: In die illa vinea meri cantabit ei.
verses.king_james: In that day sing ye unto her, A vineyard of red wine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego Dominus qui servo eam ;  repente propinabo ei.  Ne forte visitetur contra eam,  nocte et die servo eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲנִ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ נֹֽצְרָ֔הּ לִרְגָעִ֖ים אַשְׁקֶ֑נָּה פֶּ֚ן יִפְקֹ֣ד עָלֶ֔יהָ לַ֥יְלָה וָי֖וֹם אֶצֳּרֶֽנָּה׃
verses.king_james: I the Lord do keep it; I will water it every moment: lest any hurt it, I will keep it night and day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Indignatio non est mihi.  Quis dabit me spinam et veprem in prælio ?  gradiar super eam,  succendam eam pariter.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֵמָ֖ה אֵ֣ין לִ֑י מִֽי־יִתְּנֵ֜נִי שָׁמִ֥יר שַׁ֙יִת֙ בַּמִּלְחָמָ֔ה אֶפְשְׂעָ֥ה בָ֖הּ אֲצִיתֶ֥נָּה יָּֽחַד׃
verses.king_james: Fury is not in me: who would set the briers and thorns against me in battle? I would go through them, I would burn them together.

verses.latin_vulgate: An potius tenebit fortitudinem meam ?  faciet pacem mihi,  pacem faciet mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: א֚וֹ יַחֲזֵ֣ק בְּמָעוּזִּ֔י יַעֲשֶׂ֥ה שָׁל֖וֹם לִ֑י שָׁל֖וֹם יַעֲשֶׂה־לִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: Or let him take hold of my strength, that he may make peace with me; and he shall make peace with me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ingrediuntur impetu ad Jacob,  florebit et germinabit Israël,  et implebunt faciem orbis semine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַבָּאִים֙ יַשְׁרֵ֣שׁ יַֽעֲקֹ֔ב יָצִ֥יץ וּפָרַ֖ח יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וּמָלְא֥וּ פְנֵי־תֵבֵ֖ל תְּנוּבָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: He shall cause them that come of Jacob to take root: Israel shall blossom and bud, and fill the face of the world with fruit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid juxta plagam percutientis se percussit eum ?  aut sicut occidit interfectos ejus, sic occisus est ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַכְּמַכַּ֥ת מַכֵּ֖הוּ הִכָּ֑הוּ אִם־כְּהֶ֥רֶג הֲרֻגָ֖יו הֹרָֽג׃
verses.king_james: Hath he smitten him, as he smote those that smote him? or is he slain according to the slaughter of them that are slain by him?

verses.latin_vulgate: In mensura contra mensuram,  cum abjecta fuerit, judicabis eam ;  meditatus est in spiritu suo duro  per diem æstus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּסַאסְּאָ֖ה בְּשַׁלְחָ֣הּ תְּרִיבֶ֑נָּה הָגָ֛ה בְּרוּח֥וֹ הַקָּשָׁ֖ה בְּי֥וֹם קָדִֽים׃
verses.king_james: In measure, when it shooteth forth, thou wilt debate with it: he stayeth his rough wind in the day of the east wind.

verses.latin_vulgate: Idcirco super hoc dimittetur iniquitas domui Jacob ;  et iste omnis fructus : ut auferatur peccatum ejus,  cum posuerit omnes lapides altaris  sicut lapides cineris allisos :  non stabunt luci et delubra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן בְּזֹאת֙ יְכֻפַּ֣ר עֲוֺֽן־יַעֲקֹ֔ב וְזֶ֕ה כׇּל־פְּרִ֖י הָסִ֣ר חַטָּאת֑וֹ בְּשׂוּמ֣וֹ ׀ כׇּל־אַבְנֵ֣י מִזְבֵּ֗חַ כְּאַבְנֵי־גִר֙ מְנֻפָּצ֔וֹת לֹא־יָקֻ֥מוּ אֲשֵׁרִ֖ים וְחַמָּנִֽים׃
verses.king_james: By this therefore shall the iniquity of Jacob be purged; and this is all the fruit to take away his sin; when he maketh all the stones of the altar as chalkstones that are beaten in sunder, the groves and images shall not stand up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Civitas enim munita desolata erit ;  speciosa relinquetur, et dimittetur quasi desertum ;  ibi pascetur vitulus,  et ibi accubabit, et consumet summitates ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י עִ֤יר בְּצוּרָה֙ בָּדָ֔ד נָוֶ֕ה מְשֻׁלָּ֥ח וְנֶעֱזָ֖ב כַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר שָׁ֣ם יִרְעֶ֥ה עֵ֛גֶל וְשָׁ֥ם יִרְבָּ֖ץ וְכִלָּ֥ה סְעִפֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Yet the defenced city shall be desolate, and the habitation forsaken, and left like a wilderness: there shall the calf feed, and there shall he lie down, and consume the branches thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: In siccitate messes illius conterentur.  Mulieres venientes, et docentes eam ;  non est enim populus sapiens :  propterea non miserebitur ejus qui fecit eum,  et qui formavit eum non parcet ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּיבֹ֤שׁ קְצִירָהּ֙ תִּשָּׁבַ֔רְנָה נָשִׁ֕ים בָּא֖וֹת מְאִיר֣וֹת אוֹתָ֑הּ כִּ֣י לֹ֤א עַם־בִּינוֹת֙ ה֔וּא עַל־כֵּן֙ לֹא־יְרַחֲמֶ֣נּוּ עֹשֵׂ֔הוּ וְיֹצְר֖וֹ לֹ֥א יְחֻנֶּֽנּוּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: When the boughs thereof are withered, they shall be broken off: the women come, and set them on fire: for it is a people of no understanding: therefore he that made them will not have mercy on them, and he that formed them will shew them no favour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit : in die illa  percutiet Dominus  ab alveo fluminis usque ad torrentem Ægypti ;  et vos congregabimini unus et unus, filii Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא יַחְבֹּ֧ט יְהֹוָ֛ה מִשִּׁבֹּ֥לֶת הַנָּהָ֖ר עַד־נַ֣חַל מִצְרָ֑יִם וְאַתֶּ֧ם תְּלֻקְּט֛וּ לְאַחַ֥ד אֶחָ֖ד בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that the Lord shall beat off from the channel of the river unto the stream of Egypt, and ye shall be gathered one by one, O ye children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit : in die illa clangetur in tuba magna ;  et venient qui perditi fuerant de terra Assyriorum,  et qui ejecti erant in terra Ægypti,  et adorabunt Dominum  in monte sancto in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה ׀ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֗וּא יִתָּקַע֮ בְּשׁוֹפָ֣ר גָּדוֹל֒ וּבָ֗אוּ הָאֹֽבְדִים֙ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ אַשּׁ֔וּר וְהַנִּדָּחִ֖ים בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם וְהִשְׁתַּחֲו֧וּ לַיהֹוָ֛ה בְּהַ֥ר הַקֹּ֖דֶשׁ בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that the great trumpet shall be blown, and they shall come which were ready to perish in the land of Assyria, and the outcasts in the land of Egypt, and shall worship the Lord in the holy mount at Jerusalem.
